name: bloodmatch-unified
description: Unified Blood Donation & Emergency Matcher Platform

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
